element.display: Identity bridge — every legacy concept_id N rebinds to the seeded CIEL concept with uuid RPAD(N, 36, 'A').

target.comment: The 2.7 demo dump uses AMPATH-style concept numbering; CIEL stores its concepts with UUIDs in the pattern <canonical_id>AAAA...A (32 A's). Measured 100% coverage on the 457 concepts referenced by obs in the current corpus. Identity rebind; reviewer rationale: AMPATH FSN strings match CIEL FSN strings modulo case. See data-model.md §R-bridge-rule.
target.display: Seeded CIEL concept resolved by UUID pattern.

element.display: P1 — obs whose value_coded is a Drug-class concept.

target.comment: Coded drug answers on obs are promoted to drug_order. Top answers in the current corpus: LAMIVUDINE, STAVUDINE, NEVIRAPINE, TRIMETHOPRIM+SULFA, ISONIAZID, EFAVIRENZ, plus vaccines (DTP, polio, HepB, Hib, measles). Typed table is canonical; source obs does NOT remain as a duplicate residual row. drug_order is the child table; parent row in orders carries uuid/concept_id. UUID is deterministic UUIDv5-style name-based per Q2 in research.md §R-typed-table-promotion. See data-model.md §R-promotion-rules for field mapping.

extension.valueString: SELECT o.obs_id, o.person_id, o.encounter_id, o.value_coded AS drug_concept_id, o.obs_datetime FROM legacy_27_raw.obs o JOIN legacy_27_raw.concept c ON c.concept_id = o.value_coded JOIN legacy_27_raw.concept_class cc ON cc.concept_class_id = c.class_id WHERE cc.name = 'Drug' AND o.voided = 0

element.display: P2 — obs whose question concept is 6042 (PROBLEM ADDED).

target.comment: PROBLEM ADDED is the semantic anchor for 'clinician recorded a new diagnosis this visit'. value_coded is the diagnosis concept (rebound via the bridge rule). 114 distinct diagnoses in the current corpus. See data-model.md §R-promotion-rules.

extension.valueString: SELECT o.obs_id, o.person_id, o.encounter_id, o.value_coded AS dx_concept_id, o.obs_datetime FROM legacy_27_raw.obs o WHERE o.concept_id = 6042 AND o.value_coded IS NOT NULL AND o.voided = 0

element.display: P3 — drug-allergy boolean questions answered YES.

target.comment: Three explicit drug-allergy questions: 6011 PENICILLIN, 6012 SULFA, 1083 OTHER MEDICINE. Promotion only on value_coded=1065 ('YES'); NO answers do NOT promote (absence of allergy is not an allergy row). Extremely sparse in the current corpus (7 obs total). Allergen substance concept is hand-picked per question concept at acceptance time. See data-model.md §R-promotion-rules.

extension.valueString: SELECT o.obs_id, o.person_id, o.encounter_id, o.concept_id AS allergen_question, o.obs_datetime FROM legacy_27_raw.obs o WHERE o.concept_id IN (6011, 6012, 1083) AND o.value_coded = 1065 AND o.voided = 0

{"patient_id": "obs.person_id", "coded_allergen": "allergen-substance pick per question concept (hand-curated)", "allergen_type": "'DRUG'", "severity_concept_id": "NULL (not recorded in legacy boolean form)", "encounter_id": "obs.encounter_id", "date_created": "obs.date_created", "creator": "obs.creator", "uuid": "UUIDv5(obs.uuid, 'allergy')"}

element.display: P4 — obs whose question concept is Test-class with Coded datatype.

target.comment: Test-class concepts with Coded datatype are lab/imaging orders. Top questions in the current corpus: IMMUNIZATIONS ORDERED (891), X-RAY CHEST (172), VDRL (33), HIV DNA PCR (15), HIV ENZYME IMMUNOASSAY (9). test_order is the child table; all parent fields live in orders. A source obs may remain as a result obs only when it is semantically the test result (not a copy of the order fact). UUID on parent orders row is deterministic UUIDv5-style name-based. See data-model.md §R-promotion-rules.

extension.valueString: SELECT o.obs_id, o.person_id, o.encounter_id, o.concept_id AS test_concept, o.value_coded AS result_coded, o.obs_datetime FROM legacy_27_raw.obs o JOIN legacy_27_raw.concept c ON c.concept_id = o.concept_id JOIN legacy_27_raw.concept_class cc ON cc.concept_class_id = c.class_id JOIN legacy_27_raw.concept_datatype cd ON cd.concept_datatype_id = c.datatype_id WHERE cc.name = 'Test' AND cd.name = 'Coded' AND o.voided = 0
